offer: ^Shadow Archivist: Ah. The adventurers. I wondered when you would arrive.
^Shadow Archivist: I am the Archivist. I catalogued the Order's secrets — including the ones they wished buried.
^Shadow Archivist: The Hollow King is not what they told you. He is a mirror — he reflects what is already in your world.
^Shadow Archivist: Reinforce those seals and you delay the inevitable. Break them, however... and you absorb his void-energy before it dissipates.
^Shadow Archivist: Power. Real power. The kind the Order feared so much they built a prison around it.
^Shadow Archivist: I offer you a choice. Fight him on his terms, weakened by your piety... or fight him on yours.
^Shadow Archivist: Speak to me again when you have decided.
dark_path_confirmed: ^Shadow Archivist: Wise. Or perhaps merely honest.
^Shadow Archivist: When you defeat the Hollow King with the seals broken, his void-energy flows to the victors.
^Shadow Archivist: You will carry a piece of the void from this day forward. Use it well.
aftermath: ^Shadow Archivist: Whatever path you chose, you are still standing. That is more than most managed.
^Shadow Archivist: The Sanctum will hold. For a time. Everything ends eventually.
